title: 10 best herbal creams for migraine
description: Ginkgo biloba, also known as maidenhair tree, creams helps with migraine because of its ability to improve blood circulation and reduce inflammation. The extract of Ginkgo biloba is rich in antioxidants and flavonoids, which work together to widen blood vessels and promote oxygenation of the brain. This helps to alleviate migraine symptoms such as pain, sensitivity to light, and nausea. Additionally, Ginkgo biloba's anti-inflammatory properties may also help to reduce migraine frequenc...
